questions.question: Which keyword declares a read-only variable in Kotlin?
questions.explanation: val declares a read-only (single-assignment) variable, while var declares a mutable one.

questions.question: What does the safe call operator ?. do?
options: Returns null if the receiver is null, otherwise calls the method
Converts null to an empty string
questions.explanation: ?. returns null instead of throwing NullPointerException when the receiver is null.
